archetypes.name: Flying Death
archetypes.desc:
- Gargoyle Broods & Tyranid Warrior Broods with the "Winged" Biomorph can be taken as Troops.
- Only Gargoyle Broods & Tyranid Warrior Broods with the "Winged" Biomorph count towards the 25% Troops limitation.
- At least half of all Gargoyle Brood & Tyranid Warrior Broods with the "Winged" Biomorph must start the game in reserves, even if the mission does not allow reserves.

archetypes.name: Megafauna
archetypes.desc:
- Carnifex Broods can be taken as Troops.
- Only Carnifex Broods count towards the 25% Troops limitation.

archetypes.name: Tyrannocyte Assault
archetypes.desc:
- All units must start the game as passengers inside a Tyrannocyte.
- Half of all Tyrannocyte in the army (round up) arrive automatically in the first battle round as reinforcements. The other half arrives automatically in the second battle round.

legacies.name: Adaptive Toxins
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from Hive Fleet Gorgon in the Hive Armory.

legacies.name: Bio-Barrage
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from Hive Fleet Kronos in the Hive Armory.

legacies.name: Hyper-Aggression
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from Hive Fleet Behemoth in the Hive Armory.

legacies.name: Questing Tendrils
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from Hive Fleet Kraken in the Hive Armory.

legacies.name: Synaptic Control
legacies.desc: The army has access to equipment from Hive Fleet Leviathan in the Hive Armory.
